summary: Completed comprehensive testing of voice message and dark mode features. Backend tests: 100% pass rate (39/39) including new voice message functionality. Frontend tests: Login works, dark mode toggle and admin panel elements detected, but session management issues prevent full UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: User session not persisting properly during navigation, causing redirects back to login page

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent session timeouts during automated testing preventing full UI flow testing

passed_tests: Backend: All 39 API tests passed (100% success rate)
Backend: Voice file upload works (audio/webm format)
Backend: Voice messages appear in conversations
Backend: Admin endpoints work (GET /api/admin/users, DELETE /api/admin/users/{id}, GET /api/admin/stats)
Frontend: Login form works with admin@chatapp.com credentials
Frontend: Chat interface loads and displays conversations
Frontend: Dark mode toggle button exists with correct data-testid
Frontend: Admin panel button exists for admin users
Frontend: Chat list displays conversations including voice messages
Frontend: Voice messages show as 'رسالة صوتية' in conversation list
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend session management issue causing navigation redirects to login page. This prevents full testing of dark mode persistence and voice message UI interactions. Session cookies may not be properly maintained during page navigation.
